gitCommit.subject: 👷 Prod E2E testing: upload JSON report too
gitCommit.body:
👷 Prod E2E testing: upload JSON report too

Useful for automated alerts if E2E tests fail on prod, with e.g. Uptime Kuma

gitCommit.subject: 👷 Prod E2E testing: upload JSON report too
gitCommit.body:
👷 Prod E2E testing: upload JSON report too

Useful for automated alerts if E2E tests fail on prod, with e.g. Uptime Kuma

specs.title: allows cancelling classification of an observation
when observation has no crop box
can import a protocol and pre-set models via URL parameters
